## We are a startup founded in Switzerland’s Biopôle to pioneer a new era of**health and wellness** by merging cutting-edge Swiss science with traditional wisdom.

With a holistic, clinically proven approach, SKYLAB develops innovative healing solutions for both body and mind. Collaborating with world-leading scientists, we are redefining longevity, well-being, and personal health through groundbreaking research and technology. SKYLAB’s purpose is to inspire and support people’s journey to be more resilient and to live a longer life.

![Image 2](https://skylaboratory.ch/cdn/shop/files/Image.jpg?v=1745408560&width=1500)

Collaborating with world-leading scientists, we are redefining longevity, well-being, and personal health through groundbreaking research and technology. SKYLAB’s purpose is to inspire and support people’s journey to be more resilient and to live a longer life.

In our work, we focus on research and new product invention in the following categories:

*   Skincare
*   Oralcare
*   Haircare
*   Supplements / Wellness
*   Health Diagnostics & Devices

## AWARD WINNER INNOVATION PERFORMANCE

![Image 3](https://skylaboratory.ch/cdn/shop/files/img.jpg?v=1745408668&width=1500)

## AWARD WINNER INNOVATION PERFORMANCE

Recognised among the top 500 most innovative companies in Switzerland by SIQT

Skylab has been honored by the Swiss Institute for Quality Tests (SIQT) as one of the most innovative mid-sized companies in Switzerland for 2024/25 in the field of Household & Consumer goods. The SIQT Innovation Award recognizes Swiss mid-sized enterprises to honor their innovation strength.

![Image 4](https://skylaboratory.ch/cdn/shop/files/Skylab_Swiss.png?v=1747046332&width=600)

**10+** years of research and product development

**40+** countries trust us

**15** innovation patents pending

## SCIENTIFIC ADVISORY BOARD

*   ![Image 5](https://skylaboratory.ch/cdn/shop/files/image2.jpg?v=1745408979&width=3200)  ### Angela Tewari, MBBS, BSc, MRCP, PhD

Consultant dermatologist based in London with a specialist interest in cosmetic and paediatric dermatology.   
*   ![Image 6](https://skylaboratory.ch/cdn/shop/files/Guenole_Addor.webp?v=1747044564&width=3200)  ### Guénolé Addor, MD

Faculty member at the Geneva College of Longevity Science, Switzerland.   
*   ![Image 7](https://skylaboratory.ch/cdn/shop/files/Anna_Erat.webp?v=1747044565&width=3200)  ### Anna Erat, MD, PhD, IDP INSEAD

Former Medical Director at Hirslanden, Medical Expert, Independent Board Member, Mentor at ETH, and Faculty member at the University of St. Gallen.   
*   ![Image 8](https://skylaboratory.ch/cdn/shop/files/Toshie_Matsumiya.webp?v=1747044565&width=3200)  ### Toshie Matsumiya, MD

Board-certified plastic surgeon, physiatrist, anti-ageing expert and functional medicine practitioner, Tokyo, Japan.
